final_prompt.prompt:
Create a close-up food photography shot of a Japanese ramen bowl (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "美食摄影" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Japanese 食べログ food photography tradition, Kinfolk magazine food editorial style, 深夜食堂 cinematic food close-ups; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be close-up shot with chopsticks lifting noodles as focal point
Subject: must include 日式拉面 bowl with 豚骨汤底, 叉烧, 溏心蛋, 海苔, 葱花
Scene/backdrop: must be blurred background (bokeh) to emphasize the bowl
Lighting/mood: needs a "食欲感" appetite-triggering atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, warm direction — exact saturation and tones are yours
Materials/textures: must include visible steam rising from the hot broth
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
